linapro-mail-core.name: Mail - Core
linapro-mail-core.description: Manages mail server connections and accounts, and provides the shared mail capability used by SMTP, IMAP, and POP3 plugins. Platform email notifications also go through this plugin.

settings.description: Configure the single platform mail account for notifications and mail capabilities.
settings.fromAddressHelp: Default From address used when sending mail. Leave blank to use the account value above.
settings.usernameHelp: Mailbox login account shared by SMTP and inbound. Usually the full email address.
settings.passwordHelp: Mailbox password shared by SMTP and inbound. Leave blank to keep the previously saved password.
settings.passwordKeepPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep saved password
settings.smtpTlsHelp: Disable: plain connection. STARTTLS: upgrade after plain handshake (common port 587). TLS: encrypt the whole session (common port 465). Follow your provider docs.
settings.inboundKindHelp: Choose IMAP or POP3 to enable receiving, or None for send-only. Switching protocol applies common default port and TLS. Credentials use the shared fields above.
settings.inboundTlsHelp: Disable: plain connection. STARTTLS: upgrade after connect. TLS: full-session encryption (IMAP often 993, POP3 often 995). Follow your provider docs.
settings.sendTestHelp: Sends using the SMTP values currently on this form (no need to save first). Confirm the recipient receives the message.
settings.sendTestSubjectPlaceholder: Optional; uses a default subject when empty
settings.sendTestBodyPlaceholder: This is a test message from LinaPro mail settings.
settings.sendTestBodyDefault: This is a test message from LinaPro mail settings. Receiving it means the current SMTP configuration can send mail.
settings.receiveTestInboundRequired: Select an inbound protocol (IMAP or POP3) before testing receive.
